tagline: Full Service Pool Maintenance by a Veteran You Can Trust

hero.headline: Veteran-Owned Pool Care Mesa Trusts
hero.subheadline: For over 14 years, Army veteran Kevin Swafford has kept East Valley pools crystal clear. From weekly maintenance to complex repairs, we handle every detail so you can just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block"> Arizona's Toughest Conditions
services.subtitle: From scorching summers to monsoon season, Arizona pools need expert attention. We provide full-service maintenance and repairs so your pool stays safe and swim-ready year-round.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks to keep your pool sparkling and swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, motors, and salt systems. Most repairs completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Green Pool Cleanup
cards.description: Complete green pool muck-outs and pressure washing to transform neglected pools back to crystal-clear condition in days, not weeks.

cards.title: Acid Wash & Chlorine Rinse
cards.description: Professional surface treatments to remove stubborn stains, algae buildup, and calcium deposits, restoring your pool's original beauty.

cards.title: Salt System & Cell Service
cards.description: Cleaning, repair, and replacement of salt systems and salt cells to ensure proper chlorine generation and balanced water quality.

cards.title: Pool Draining & Refills
cards.description: Safe pool draining for maintenance, repairs, or chemistry resets, followed by proper refilling and full chemical balancing.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. Kevin will assess your pool, answer your questions, and provide an honest quote — no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Our experienced team arrives on schedule with the right tools and parts. Cleaning, balancing, repairs — we handle it all so you don't have to.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and safe all year. If anything isn't right, we come back and fix it — that's our veteran's promise to you.

about.label: Why East Valley Trusts Us
about.headline: A Veteran's Commitment to Your Pool
about.description: Founded in 2011 by U.S. Army veteran Kevin Swafford, Malibu Pool Service and Repair brings military discipline and integrity to every job. For over 14 years, we've been the trusted pool care partner for families across Mesa, Gilbert, Chandler, Tempe, and Ahwatukee. As a locally owned company, we understand Arizona's unique pool challenges and treat every customer like a neighbor.

features.title: Veteran-Owned & Operated
features.description: Kevin brings the same discipline, reliability, and attention to detail from his Army service to every pool we maintain.

features.title: Military & First Responder Discounts
features.description: We proudly offer special pricing for military families, police officers, and firefighters — our way of honoring those who serve.

features.title: 14+ Years of Local Experience
features.description: Over a decade of hands-on Arizona pool care means we know every issue the desert climate throws at your pool.

pricing.headline: Straight-Talk Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get a plan that fits your pool and your budget. Flexible options with no long-term contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our Veteran's Honor Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. Kevin built this company on the same values he learned in the Army — integrity, accountability, and doing the job right the first time. Your satisfaction is our mission.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we can often respond same-day or next-day. Call Kevin directly and we'll work around your timeline.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during pool service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our Mesa and Gilbert clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll always know what was done at each visit.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for military or first responders?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. As a veteran-owned business, we proudly offer special pricing for military families, police officers, and firefighters. Just let us know when you request your quote.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire East Valley including Mesa, Gilbert, Chandler, Tempe, Ahwatukee, Queen Creek, and San Tan Valley. If you're nearby and unsure, give us a call — we'll let you know.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Malibu Pool Service is fully insured, BBB A+ rated, and operated by licensed pool professional Kevin Swafford. Your property and peace of mind are always protected.

testimonials.name: Eric M.
testimonials.text: Kevin at Malibu has been fantastic to work with! He installed a new heater and has helped me adjust things for my pool. He gives great advice for overall maintenance.

testimonials.name: Jules C.
testimonials.text: Malibu Pool has always been able to diagnose any problem quickly, and have the parts with them to fix the issue right away. Very knowledgeable and dependable service.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: Kevin came out a day earlier than scheduled and fixed our pump. Really appreciated the quick turnaround and professional service. Highly recommend for any pool repairs.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation quote from a veteran you can trust. We respond within 24 hours — no contracts, no pressure, just honest pool care.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
